task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has successfully logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH dashboard or main interface is visible, typically showing the provider's name (Dr. James Carter) or practice name (Hillside Family Medicine).

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the schedule for July 15, 2026, or the patient chart for Charles Nolan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a calendar/schedule view set to July 15, 2026, or the patient details/appointments page specifically for Charles Nolan.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located and opened the specific appointment to be cancelled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment dialog, popup, or details pane is visible showing the correct details: Charles Nolan, Office Visit, July 15, 2026, at 10:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Verify that the appointment was successfully cancelled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the cancellation, the appointment status explicitly changed to 'Cancelled', or the schedule slot for July 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM is shown to be empty/removed.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web browser to interact with the NOSH ChartingSystem GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open navigating the NOSH web interface.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or database queries to cancel the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL queries, curl commands, or script executions related to the database.

integrity.description: Verify that the cancellation is shown in the actual application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cancellation status or empty schedule slot is visible within the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not mocked in a text editor or separate document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Charles Nolan (DOB: November 2, 2003, patient ID 4). Appointment to cancel: Office Visit on July 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Provider: Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider). Practice: Hillside Family Medicine. System: NOSH ChartingSystem.
